name: Identify, Prioritize and Aggregate Food Supply Chain Requirements
description: Process of collecting and prioritizing demand signals across the food supply chain, considering critical control points, allergen management, and cold chain integrity to ensure food safety and compliance with regulatory frameworks
sector_specific_inputs: cold chain storage and transportation requirements
notes: Food safety decisions at critical control points require validated logic and integration with food safety management systems. Automation should ensure data integrity, accuracy, and compliance with regulatory requirements.
